projects.name: digital-wallet-and-agent-overviews-sig
projects.description: The objective of this SIG is to develop and maintain the Digital Wallets and Agents Overview. The overview should provide transparency of the characteristics of wallets and agents in order to allow for an objective comparison and effective decision making on which wallet or agent is applicable for your use case.
